markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 17. OFFENSES AND PROSECUTION [40000.1 - 41610]
### Chapter 2. Procedure on Arrests [40300 - 40618]
#### Article 2. Release Upon Promise to Appear [40500 - 40522]
##### § 40506.5

Prior to the date upon which the defendant promised to appear and without depositing bail, the defendant may request a continuance of the written promise to appear. A judge of the superior court may authorize the clerk to grant the continuance.

*(Amended by Stats. 2002, Ch. 784, Sec. 604. Effective January 1, 2003.)*
